# ACDC Home Services

> Premium appliance repair, refrigeration, and HVAC specialists serving the Dallas–Fort Worth (DFW) metroplex. Rated 4.8★ from 430+ Google reviews. Specialists in high-end and built-in brands (Sub-Zero, Wolf, Viking, Thermador) for luxury and custom homes. Same-day service available.

## Key facts

- **Business:** ACDC Home Services (legal entity: AC-DC HVAC & Appliance Repair LLC)
- **Phone:** (469) 224-0577
- **Service area:** Dallas–Fort Worth, TX — based in Grapevine (76051), serving Southlake, Westlake, Highland Park, University Park, Colleyville, Keller, Flower Mound, Trophy Club, Highland Village, Coppell, Carrollton, Irving, Grapevine, Bedford, Euless, Hurst, Dallas
- **Rating:** 4.8 out of 5 stars, 430+ verified Google reviews
- **Diagnostic fee:** $90, waived when you proceed with the repair
- **Availability:** Same-day service (call before noon for best availability)
- **Experience:** 7 years specializing in premium and built-in appliances

## What we repair

- **Premium brands:** Sub-Zero, Wolf, Viking, Thermador, KitchenAid, JennAir, GE Monogram, Dacor, Miele, Bosch
- **Standard brands:** Samsung, LG, Whirlpool, GE, Frigidaire, Maytag
- **Appliances:** refrigerators (built-in, integrated, columns), freezers, ice makers, wine coolers, ranges, cooktops, wall ovens, dishwashers
- **Refrigeration:** ice machines, walk-in coolers, walk-in freezers, commercial refrigeration
- **HVAC:** diagnostics and repair
- **Commercial:** restaurants, hotels, coworking spaces, retail (clients include IWG, Wingstop, Salata, Marriott). Preventive maintenance contracts from $349/year.

## Why ACDC

- Premium and built-in specialists — not a general dispatch company. The owner diagnoses high-end units personally.
- Flat-rate quote provided before any work begins — no surprise charges.
- Honest assessment: if a repair doesn't make financial sense versus replacement, we say so.
